text: ⚡️ 🇳🇬 At least 200 people are feared dead after a Nigerian airstrike hit a village market in Yobe state during an operation targeting militants, according to local officials and residents. The strike reportedly occurred near Jilli Market along the Yobe–Borno border, with casualties taken to nearby hospitals. The military says it targeted militants and has not confirmed striking the market. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇳🇬 据当地官员和居民称，尼日利亚在约贝州进行针对武装分子的行动时，一次空袭击中了一个乡村市场，据信造成至少200人死亡。据报道，空袭发生在约贝州与博尔诺州边界的吉利市场附近，伤者已被送往附近医院。军方表示其目标是武装分子，并未证实袭击了该市场。@wfwitness

text: ⚡ 🇮🇱 Red alert sirens are sounding in the Confrontation Line region, Northern Israel. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡ 🇮🇱 以色列北部对抗线地区响起红色警报。@wfwitness

text: Iran’s Ghalibaf: If the Americans test our will again, we will give them an even bigger lesson.
text_zh: 伊朗卡利巴夫：如果美国人再次考验我们的意志，我们将给他们一个更大的教训。

text: Iran’s Ghalibaf: Threats have no effect on the Iranian nation. We have proven that this is not a slogan—the world has seen it with its own eyes. We have shown that the enemy has reached a state of desperation. We have proven that we do not surrender under threats. Over 47 years of the revolution, in military arenas, economic sanctions, political pressure, and more, the Iranian people have demonstrated this in practice.
text_zh: 伊朗卡利巴夫：威胁对伊朗民族没有任何影响。我们已经证明这不仅仅是一句口号——全世界都亲眼目睹了。我们已经表明敌人已陷入绝望。我们证明了我们不会在威胁下投降。在革命的47年里，无论是在军事领域、经济制裁、政治压力还是其他方面，伊朗人民都在实践中证明了这一点。

text: Iran’s Ghalibaf: If the United States wants to find a way out, the only path is to decide to earn the trust of the Iranian people. You are indebted to the Iranian nation and still have much to do to make amends. If you choose war, we will fight; if you come with logic, we will respond with logic. We will not submit to any threats. If they test our will again, we will give them a greater lesson.
text_zh: 伊朗卡利巴夫：如果美国想寻找出路，唯一的途径就是决定赢得伊朗人民的信任。你们欠伊朗民族的债，要弥补还需要做很多工作。如果你们选择战争，我们将战斗；如果你们讲道理，我们将以理回应。我们不会屈服于任何威胁。如果他们再次考验我们的意志，我们将给他们一个更大的教训。

text: 🇺🇸 Watch the awkward moment when Artemis II astronaut Christina Koch forgets her lines (or her earpiece cuts out) and she just stands there looking awkward. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 观看阿尔忒弥斯2号宇航员克里斯蒂娜·科赫忘记台词（或耳机断开）的尴尬时刻，她只是站在那里，看起来很尴尬。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Status-6 (War & Military News) RT @LucasFoxNews : Vice President Vance’s final offer delivered to the Iranian delegation in Islamabad, which represent ‘red lines,’ according to two U.S. officials: 1. End all uranium enrichment 2. Dismantle all major nuclear enrichment facilities 3. Retrieve highly enriched uranium 4. Accept a broader peace, security and de-escalation framework that includes regional allies 5. End funding for terrorist proxies Hamas, Hezbollah, and the Houthis 6. Fully open the Strait of Hormuz, charging no tolls for passage tweet
text_zh: Status-6（战争与军事新闻）转发 @LucasFoxNews：据两名美国官员称，万斯副总统向伊斯兰堡的伊朗代表团提交了最终提议，代表了“红线”：1. 结束所有铀浓缩；2. 拆除所有主要核浓缩设施；3. 收回高浓缩铀；4. 接受包括地区盟友在内的更广泛的和平、安全与降级框架；5. 停止资助恐怖主义代理人哈马斯、真主党和胡塞武装；6. 完全开放霍尔木兹海峡，通行不收取任何费用。推文

text: Open Source Intel The U.K. is working with France and other partners to create a coalition to protect freedom of navigation. The UK will not take part in the U.S.-led blockade of the Strait of Hormuz. "We continue to support freedom of navigation and the opening of the strait, which is urgently needed to support the global economy," a government spokesperson told Sky News. - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：英国正与法国及其他伙伴合作，建立一个保护航行自由的联盟。英国不会参与美国领导的霍尔木兹海峡封锁行动。一位政府发言人告诉天空新闻：“我们继续支持航行自由和海峡开放，这对于支持全球经济至关重要。” - 开源情报推文

text: Open Source Intel The UK will not take part in the U.S.-led blockade of the Strait of Hormuz. "We continue to support freedom of navigation and the opening of the strait, which is urgently needed to support the global economy," a government spokesperson told Sky News. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：英国不会参与美国领导的霍尔木兹海峡封锁行动。一位政府发言人告诉天空新闻：“我们继续支持航行自由和海峡开放，这对于支持全球经济至关重要。”推文

text: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : ❗️ 🇮🇱 🇮🇷 Israel’s cabinet is set to convene today at 20:00 local time following the expected failure of U.S.–Iran negotiations. 🔹 Officials are expected to discuss the potential resumption of strikes on Iran, as tensions have escalated after talks in Pakistan collapsed. 🔹 In parallel, the General Staff has placed military forces on the highest level of readiness due to the risk of renewed conflict, with the IDF instructed to maintain immediate operational preparedness. See the latest updates with us: @NSTRIKE1231 tweet
text_zh: Visioner 转发 @NSTRIKE1231：❗️ 🇮🇱 🇮🇷 在美伊谈判预期失败后，以色列内阁定于当地时间今天20:00召开会议。🔹 官员们预计将讨论恢复对伊朗进行打击的可能性，因为在巴基斯坦的会谈破裂后，紧张局势已经升级。🔹 与此同时，由于冲突重燃的风险，总参谋部已将军事力量置于最高戒备状态，并指示以色列国防军保持即时作战准备。与我们一起查看最新动态：@NSTRIKE1231 推文

text: Open Source Intel IRGC: "Military vessels nearing the Strait of Hormuz will be deemed a ceasefire violation and will be handled firmly." tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队：“接近霍尔木兹海峡的军用船只将被视为违反停火协议，并将受到严厉处理。”推文

text: Open Source Intel NEW 🔴 Channel 14: Heightened alert in Israel over the possibility that Iran could derail negotiations with a large-scale attack on Israeli territory. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 最新 🔴 第14频道：以色列处于高度戒备状态，担心伊朗可能通过对以色列领土发动大规模袭击来破坏谈判。推文

text: Open Source Intel Miami's 23-story Mandarin Oriental on Brickell Key was brought down in a controlled implosion. A new ultraluxury hotel and residences complex is planned for the site, with completion targeted for 2030. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043380230132289582/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 迈阿密布里克尔礁上23层高的文华东方酒店在一次受控内爆中被拆除。该地点计划建设一个新的超豪华酒店和住宅综合体，目标是在2030年完工。https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043380230132289582/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Boeing KC-135 Stratotanke arrives at RAF Mildenhall with heavy shrapnel damage visible across the aircraft. @RapidReport2025 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043379443062710442/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 波音KC-135空中加油机抵达英国米尔登霍尔皇家空军基地，飞机上可见严重的弹片损伤。@RapidReport2025 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043379443062710442/video/1 推文

text: WarTranslated Polling stations in Hungary are now closed. Turnout hit 77.8 percent by 18:30 local or 5.856 million voters, the National Election Commission says, and the final figure will be close to 80 percent. https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2043378034569289919/photo/1 Parliamentary elections have started in Hungary. - WarTranslated tweet
text_zh: WarTranslated 匈牙利投票站现已关闭。国家选举委员会表示，截至当地时间18:30，投票率达到77.8%，即585.6万选民，最终数字将接近80%。https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2043378034569289919/photo/1 匈牙利议会选举已经开始。 - WarTranslated 推文

text: The UK will not join the US blockade of the Strait of Hormuz.
text_zh: 英国不会加入美国对霍尔木兹海峡的封锁。

text: 🇺🇸 🇬🇧 🇮🇷 BREAKING: The UK says it will not take part in U.S. blockade of the Strait of Hormuz Trump claimed earlier today that ‘the UK will send warships to help, and probably other countries will too’. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 🇬🇧 🇮🇷 快讯：英国表示不会参与美国对霍尔木兹海峡的封锁。特朗普今天早些时候声称“英国将派遣军舰提供帮助，其他国家可能也会这样做”。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Chairman of Knesset National Security Committee Tzvika Foghel mocks Trump: Donald, if you have to shoot, shoot. Don’t quack 🦆
text_zh: 以色列议会国家安全委员会主席茨维卡·福格尔嘲讽特朗普：唐纳德，如果你要开枪，就开枪。别只会嘎嘎叫 🦆

text: ⚡️ 🇬🇧 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Sky News: A British government spokesperson says that Britain will not participate in the U.S.’s blockade of the Strait of Hormuz. “We continue to support freedom of navigation and the opening of the Strait of Hormuz, which is urgently needed to support the global economy and the cost of living back home. The Strait of Hormuz must not be subject to tolling. We are urgently working with France and other partners to put together a wide coalition to protect freedom of navigation." @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇬🇧 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 天空新闻：一位英国政府发言人表示，英国不会参与美国对霍尔木兹海峡的封锁。“我们继续支持航行自由和霍尔木兹海峡的开放，这对于支持全球经济和国内生活成本至关重要。霍尔木兹海峡不得被征收通行费。我们正紧急与法国及其他伙伴合作，组建一个广泛的联盟来保护航行自由。” @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 🇮🇱 i24NEWS: A senior U.S. official said gaps between Washington and Tehran remain enormous, with no progress on uranium enrichment, dismantling nuclear facilities, removing enriched uranium from Iran, releasing frozen assets, halting proxy funding, or opening the Strait of Hormuz. No further talks have been scheduled. U.S. President Trump has decided to impose a naval blockade on Iran. Israel was updated in advance and welcomes the hard line. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 🇮🇱 i24NEWS：一位美国高级官员表示，华盛顿与德黑兰之间的分歧依然巨大，在铀浓缩、拆除核设施、从伊朗运出浓缩铀、释放冻结资产、停止资助代理人或开放霍尔木兹海峡方面均无进展。目前尚未安排进一步的会谈。美国总统特朗普已决定对伊朗实施海上封锁。以色列已提前获悉并欢迎这一强硬路线。@wfwitness

text: 🇮🇷 | Iranian MP, Nabavian, who was present as part of the Iranian delegation in Islamabad: There were 3 serious disagreements in the talks (with the US,) 3 demands Iran did not accept. @FotrosResistancee
text_zh: 🇮🇷 | 伊朗议员纳巴维安（Nabavian）作为伊朗代表团成员出席了伊斯兰堡的会谈：会谈中存在3个严重分歧，即伊朗未接受的3个要求。@FotrosResistancee

text: — ❗️ 🇺🇸 / 🇮🇷 A member of Iran’s delegation in Islamabad, MP Seyyed Mohammad Nabavian: Some reasons for the non-agreement with America: 1. They wanted a joint share with Iran in the benefits of the Strait of Hormuz!! 2. They wanted our 60% enriched uranium to be shipped out of Iran. 3. They wanted to deprive Iran of the right to enrich uranium for 20 years. @Middle_East_Spectator ✍ They also requested Iran abandon its allies and sign a comprehensive peace deal in the Middle East They also requested Iran to dismantle all its nuclear infrastructure including the scientific schools for it. The same terms they demanded before the war they are demanding again now. If Iran wanted to accept this they wouldn't have sacrificed their finest then
text_zh: — ❗️ 🇺🇸 / 🇮🇷 伊朗伊斯兰堡代表团成员、议员赛义德·穆罕默德·纳巴维安：与美国未能达成协议的一些原因：1. 他们想与伊朗共同分享霍尔木兹海峡的利益！！2. 他们想把我们60%的浓缩铀运出伊朗。3. 他们想剥夺伊朗20年的铀浓缩权利。@Middle_East_Spectator ✍ 他们还要求伊朗放弃盟友并签署一份中东全面和平协议。他们还要求伊朗拆除所有核基础设施，包括相关的科学学校。他们现在要求的正是战争前他们所要求的那些条件。如果伊朗想接受这些，当初就不会牺牲他们最优秀的人了。

text: ❗️ The Israeli army is implementing the directives it got in Gaza in Lebanon: Wipe out all of the south Lebanon security strip area by demolishing eve ry Lebanese town and bulldozing all forests, green, farms, and any human infrastructure. And once done, create a wider security strip that doesn't include Israeli presence but is controlled by Israeli fire though targeting anyone near the area up to 8-10 km from the Lebanese border
text_zh: ❗️ 以色列军队正在黎巴嫩实施其在加沙的指令：通过拆除每个黎巴嫩城镇并推平所有森林、绿地、农场和任何人类基础设施，彻底清除黎巴嫩南部安全区。一旦完成，将建立一个更广泛的安全区，该区域不包括以色列的存在，但由以色列火力控制，通过瞄准距离黎巴嫩边境8-10公里内的任何区域的人员。

text: Maybe we can also change the name of Bkerkeh to Husseiniet Imam Ali Khamenie too
text_zh: 也许我们也可以把比克尔凯（Bkerkeh）的名字也改成伊玛目阿里·哈梅内伊侯赛因尼亚（Husseiniet Imam Ali Khamenie）。

text_zh: ⚡ 🇮🇱 以色列北部对抗线地区无人机警报响起。@wfwitness

text: Hezbullah released phenomenal footage of a suicide drone launch towards an Israeli army gathering point in the town of Taybeh The Israeli forces were located using ground intelligence and then information was related to the targeting team ⭕ بالفيديو | مشاهد من عملية استهداف المقاومة الإسلامية تموضع لجنود جيش العدو الإسرائيلي في بلدة الطيبة جنوبي لبنان بمسيّرة انقضاضيّة. جودة عالية #الإعلام_الحربي
text_zh: 真主党发布了令人震惊的自杀式无人机发射画面，目标是黎巴嫩泰贝镇（Taybeh）的一个以色列军队集结点。以色列军队的位置是通过地面情报确定的，随后信息被传达给目标小组。⭕ 视频 | 抵抗力量瞄准黎巴嫩南部泰贝镇以色列敌军士兵阵地的行动画面，使用自杀式无人机。高清 #军事媒体

text: Disclose.tv JUST IN - UK says it will not be involved in U.S. blockade of the Hormuz Strait, and is currently "urgently working with France and other partners to put together a wide coalition to protect the freedom of navigation." — Sky tweet

text: Open Source Intel Prime Minister Netanyahu in southern Lebanon. "The war continues, including inside the security zone in Lebanon. Our enemies, Iran and the axis of evil, came to destroy us, and now they are fighting for their survival." https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043376288736448694/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 内塔尼亚胡总理在黎巴嫩南部。“战争仍在继续，包括在黎巴嫩境内的安全区。我们的敌人，伊朗和邪恶轴心，来到这里是为了摧毁我们，而现在他们正在为生存而战。” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043376288736448694/video/1 推文

text: ↩️ Reply to OSINT Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : 🇺🇸 Donald Trump: 📌 “It will be all or nothing — that’s the reality. You’ve seen what we did with Venezuela. This will be similar, but on a much higher level. It’s called ‘everyone in and everyone out.’” 📌 “There will come a time when everyone will be allowed to enter and exit, but it won’t be based on percentages. It won’t be limited to allies or friendly nations — the principle will be ‘all or nothing.’” 📌 “We are bringing in ships — a lot of ships. We believe many other countries will help, but we are imposing a full blockade. We will not allow Iran to profit from selective oil sales.” 📌 “We are going to block the Strait of Hormuz. It will take some time, but it will become effective very quickly.” 📌 “They came in as if they had cards, but they don’t have any.” 📌 “We have new technologies to destroy drones — so-called computerized munitions, as well as lasers that can melt drones. It’s quite something to see.” 📌 “Iran has not left the negotiating table, and I predict they will return and give us everything we want.” 📌 “I could destroy Iran in one day — even in an hour. I could take control of their entire energy sector, every facility, every power plant.” See the latest updates with us: @NSTRIKE1231 tweet
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 OSINT Visioner 转发 @NSTRIKE1231：🇺🇸 唐纳德·特朗普：📌 “要么全有，要么全无——这就是现实。你们已经看到了我们在委内瑞拉所做的事情。这将是类似的，但在更高的层面上。这被称为‘所有人进入，所有人退出’。” 📌 “总有一天，每个人都会被允许进出，但这不会基于百分比。它不会局限于盟友或友好国家——原则将是‘要么全有，要么全无’。” 📌 “我们正在调集船只——很多船只。我们相信许多其他国家会提供帮助，但我们正在实施全面封锁。我们不会允许伊朗从选择性石油销售中获利。” 📌 “我们将封锁霍尔木兹海峡。这需要一些时间，但很快就会生效。” 📌 “他们进来时好像手里有牌，但他们什么都没有。” 📌 “我们有摧毁无人机的新技术——所谓的计算机化弹药，以及可以熔化无人机的激光。这真是令人惊叹。” 📌 “伊朗并没有离开谈判桌，我预测他们会回来并给我们想要的一切。” 📌 “我可以在一天之内摧毁伊朗——甚至在一小时内。我可以控制他们的整个能源部门、每一个设施、每一个发电厂。” 与我们一起查看最新动态：@NSTRIKE1231 推文

text: Nuno Felix RT @michaeldweiss : "Tisza is on the verge of a parliamentary supermajority." 💥 Polls closed in Hungary. No exit poll, but 21 Research Institute’s Apr 8–11 exclusive survey for @Telexhu shows Tisza leading Fidesz 55–38, with Our Homeland around the 5% threshold. Tisza is on the verge of a parliamentary supermajority. https://twitter.com/panyiszabolcs/status/2043375377922338999/photo/1 - Szabolcs Panyi tweet
text_zh: Nuno Felix 转发 @michaeldweiss：“蒂萨党（Tisza）正处于议会绝对多数的边缘。” 💥 匈牙利投票结束。没有出口民调，但21研究所4月8日至11日为 @Telexhu 进行的独家调查显示，蒂萨党以55%对38%领先青民盟（Fidesz），我们的家园党（Our Homeland）在5%的门槛左右。蒂萨党正处于议会绝对多数的边缘。https://twitter.com/panyiszabolcs/status/2043375377922338999/photo/1 - Szabolcs Panyi 推文

text: Open Source Intel Tucker Carlson on President Trump: “I’ve always liked the man, I feel sorry for him, as I do for all slaves, he is not free at all…” BBC: “So, is he a slave to Benjamin Netanyahu?” Tucker: “You can summerize it that way and you wouldn’t be totally inaccurate” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043373317587914891/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 塔克·卡尔森谈特朗普总统：“我一直很喜欢这个人，我为他感到难过，就像我为所有奴隶感到难过一样，他根本不自由……” BBC：“那么，他是本雅明·内塔尼亚胡的奴隶吗？” 塔克：“你可以这样总结，而且不会完全不准确。” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043373317587914891/video/1 推文

text: 🇮🇷 What was denied in the past 24 hours — Quotes attributed to Araghchi about the negotiations and his response to Vance's behavior during the talks. — Entry of American vessels through the Strait of Hormuz. — Presence of four countries China, Russia, Saudi Arabia, and Qatar in the negotiations. — Landing of a plane in Islamabad and the joining of an Iranian official to the negotiations during the talks. — Sending weapons and military and defense equipment from China to Iran. — Airborne enemy forces in the Qalaei area of Selseleh County, Lorestan.
text_zh: 🇮🇷 过去24小时内被否认的内容 — 关于阿拉格希（Araghchi）在谈判中的言论以及他对万斯在会谈中行为的回应的引述。 — 美国船只通过霍尔木兹海峡。 — 中国、俄罗斯、沙特阿拉伯和卡塔尔四个国家出席谈判。 — 飞机在伊斯兰堡降落，伊朗官员在会谈期间加入谈判。 — 中国向伊朗运送武器及军事防御装备。 — 洛雷斯坦省塞尔塞莱县卡拉伊地区的敌方空降部队。

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Kan : A senior Israeli security official said Israel wants to renew the war against Iran, arguing that Operation Roaring Lion was halted too early without sufficient pressure on Tehran over its nuclear and ballistic missile programmes. Israel is awaiting U.S. President Trump’s decision, while the IDF is preparing alongside U.S. forces for a renewed campaign, including an American troop buildup in the region with ground troops. If a green light is given, Israel intends to strike Iranian national infrastructure and energy facilities to exert economic pressure until Tehran agrees to give up its nuclear programme. U.S. Central Command chief Admiral Brad Cooper is expected to visit Israel tomorrow. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Kan：一位以色列高级安全官员表示，以色列希望重启对伊朗的战争，认为“咆哮狮子”行动（Operation Roaring Lion）停止得太早，没有对德黑兰的核计划和弹道导弹计划施加足够的压力。以色列正在等待美国总统特朗普的决定，同时以色列国防军正与美军一道为重启行动做准备，包括美国在地区增加地面部队。如果获得绿灯，以色列打算打击伊朗的国家基础设施和能源设施，以施加经济压力，直到德黑兰同意放弃其核计划。美国中央司令部司令布拉德·库珀海军上将预计将于明天访问以色列。@wfwitness

text: — ❗️ 🇺🇸 / 🇮🇷 NEW: A staggering 68% of Americans say they are ‘worried’ about the current state of the war with Iran, with 57% saying they feel ‘stressed’ @Middle_East_Spectatir
text_zh: — ❗️ 🇺🇸 / 🇮🇷 最新：高达68%的美国人表示他们对当前与伊朗的战争状态感到“担忧”，57%的人表示感到“压力”。@Middle_East_Spectatir

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇱🇮🇷🇺🇸 Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu will convene a limited security cabinet this evening. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇮🇷 Israeli Channel 14: Israel is on heightened alert over the possibility that Iran may derail negotiations by launching a widespread attack on Israeli territory. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇱🇮🇷🇺🇸 以色列总理本雅明·内塔尼亚胡将于今晚召开有限安全内阁会议。@wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇮🇷 以色列第14频道：以色列处于高度戒备状态，担心伊朗可能通过对以色列领土发动大规模袭击来破坏谈判。@wfwitness

text: — This is how little the Americans care about their ‘allies’ in the Persian Gulf btw. They don’t care if you get hit, even in the slightest. Signing the Abraham Accords, staying silent on Palestinian genocide, enforcing rampant secularization — none of it matters, all you are is a cash cow to America. They don’t even consider you within their calculations. @Middle_East_Spectator
text_zh: — 顺便说一句，美国人对他们在波斯湾的‘盟友’有多么不在乎。他们根本不在乎你是否受到打击，哪怕是一点点。签署《亚伯拉罕协议》、对巴勒斯坦种族灭绝保持沉默、强制推行猖獗的世俗化——这些都不重要，你对美国来说只是摇钱树。他们甚至没有把你纳入他们的计算范围。@Middle_East_Spectator

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇭🇺 Polls have opened in Hungary’s national elections, with Prime Minister Viktor Orbán facing challenger Péter Magyar after 16 years of Orbán’s rule. Orbán leads the ruling Fidesz party, and has built his platform around nationalist policies and a confrontational…" ⚡️ 🇭🇺 Polls have closed in Hungary’s parliamentary election, with turnout at 77.8% as of 18:30 local time, significantly higher than the 67.8% recorded in the 2022 vote. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇭🇺 匈牙利全国大选投票已经开始，总理维克多·欧尔班在执政16年后迎来了挑战者彼得·马贾尔。欧尔班领导执政的青民盟，并围绕民族主义政策和对抗性立场建立了他的平台……” ⚡️ 🇭🇺 匈牙利议会选举投票已经结束，截至当地时间18:30，投票率为77.8%，明显高于2022年投票时记录的67.8%。@wfwitness

text: 🇮🇷 Approaching the Strait of Hormuz with military vessels will be considered a violation of the ceasefire. - IRGC In its 59th official statement, the Public Relations office of Iran’s Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps Navy rejected claims made by hostile officials and affirmed that the Strait of Hormuz remains open and under secure, controlled management. Civilian vessels continue to pass safely under established regulations. The IRGC Navy also stated that any military vessel attempting to approach the Strait, under any pretext, will be treated as a breach of the ceasefire and will face a firm and decisive response. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇮🇷 携带军用船只接近霍尔木兹海峡将被视为违反停火协议。 - 伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队 在其第59份官方声明中，伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队海军公共关系办公室驳斥了敌对官员的说法，并确认霍尔木兹海峡保持开放，处于安全、受控的管理之下。民用船只继续在既定法规下安全通行。伊朗革命卫队海军还表示，任何试图以任何借口接近海峡的军用船只都将被视为违反停火协议，并将面临坚定而果断的回应。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇱🇱🇧 Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu, Defence Minister Katz and the IDF Chief of Staff Eyal Zamir held a security situation assessment inside Lebanon. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 Israeli Prime Minister Netanyahu visited southern Lebanon with the Israeli defense minister Israel Katz and IDF chief of staff Eyal Zamir, stating that “the war continues, including inside the security zone in Lebanon.” He said Israel has thwarted the threat of invasion from Lebanon and is pushing back anti‑tank fire and rockets, but more work remains. “Our enemies – Iran and the axis of evil – came to destroy us, and now they are simply fighting for their survival. We have changed the face of the Middle East.” @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇱🇱🇧 以色列总理本雅明·内塔尼亚胡、国防部长卡茨和以色列国防军总参谋长埃亚尔·扎米尔在黎巴嫩境内进行了安全局势评估。@wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 以色列总理内塔尼亚胡与以色列国防部长以色列·卡茨和以色列国防军总参谋长埃亚尔·扎米尔访问了黎巴嫩南部，并表示“战争仍在继续，包括在黎巴嫩境内的安全区。” 他说以色列已经挫败了来自黎巴嫩的入侵威胁，并正在击退反坦克火力和火箭弹，但仍有更多工作要做。“我们的敌人——伊朗和邪恶轴心——来到这里是为了摧毁我们，而现在他们只是在为生存而战。我们已经改变了中东的面貌。” @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇵🇸🇪🇬🇺🇸🇮🇱 A Hamas delegation is holding talks in Cairo with Egyptian mediators and Nikolay Mladenov, the senior representative of the US‑backed Peace Council, to discuss the second phase of the Gaza ceasefire – including the disarmament of Hamas and the entry…" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇵🇸 🇮🇱 Talks in Cairo between mediators, US officials and Hamas on a disarmament plan are expected to continue this week, per Ynet. A U.S. official said a decision is expected within days: “We will know whether there is voluntary disarmament or by force.” The proposal envisions full disarmament over six to eight months, starting with heavy weapons and rocket production facilities, followed by tunnel destruction and surrender of small arms. Oversight would be provided by a combined Palestinian security and international stabilisation force, but the latter has been delayed due to the war with Iran. Approximately $7 billion in reconstruction pledges has been secured, but funds will not be released until disarmament begins – a condition Hamas rejects, citing it as one of the reasons it refuses to disarm. Some Hamas leaders view disarmament as surrender. Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu said on Saturday: “We will deal with it,” referring to Hamas. Israeli Army Radio noted that Netanyahu is preparing the ground for the next front – Hamas in Gaza – admitting that Hamas is far from being dismantled. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇵🇸🇪🇬🇺🇸🇮🇱 哈马斯代表团正在开罗与埃及调解人及美国支持的和平委员会高级代表尼古拉·姆拉德诺夫举行会谈，讨论加沙停火的第二阶段——包括哈马斯的解除武装和进入……” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇵🇸 🇮🇱 据Ynet报道，调解人、美国官员和哈马斯之间关于解除武装计划的开罗会谈预计将于本周继续。一位美国官员表示，预计几天内会有决定：“我们将知道是自愿解除武装还是被迫解除。” 该提案设想在六到八个月内全面解除武装，从重型武器和火箭生产设施开始，随后是摧毁隧道和上缴轻武器。监督工作将由巴勒斯坦安全部队和国际稳定部队共同提供，但后者因与伊朗的战争而推迟。已获得约70亿美元的重建承诺，但在解除武装开始前资金不会发放——哈马斯拒绝了这一条件，称这是其拒绝解除武装的原因之一。一些哈马斯领导人将解除武装视为投降。以色列总理本雅明·内塔尼亚胡周六表示：“我们将处理它”，指的是哈马斯。以色列陆军电台指出，内塔尼亚胡正在为下一个战线——加沙的哈马斯——做准备，承认哈马斯远未被拆除。@wfwitness

text: Netanyahu visits Lebanese territory under Israeli occupation.
text_zh: 内塔尼亚胡访问以色列占领下的黎巴嫩领土。

text: Trump:
text_zh: 特朗普：

text: ⚡️ 🇪🇬 🇺🇸 Egypt’s Foreign Minister Badr Abdelatty held a phone call with U.S. Special Envoy Steve Witkoff to discuss regional developments following U.S.-Iran talks in Islamabad. Witkoff briefed Egypt on the U.S. position during negotiations, while Abdelatty emphasized the importance of peaceful solutions to maintain regional stability. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇪🇬 🇺🇸 埃及外交部长巴德尔·阿卜杜勒阿蒂与美国特使史蒂夫·威特科夫通电话，讨论美伊伊斯兰堡会谈后的地区局势发展。威特科夫向埃及通报了美国在谈判中的立场，而阿卜杜勒阿蒂强调了和平解决方案对于维护地区稳定的重要性。@wfwitness

text: 🇺🇸 A U.S. Air Force KC-135 tanker in the UK before returning to the United States. Dozens of patched impact holes are visible across the aircraft, reportedly from an Iranian strike on an airbase in Saudi Arabia. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 一架美国空军KC-135加油机在返回美国前停留在英国。飞机上可见数十个修补过的撞击孔，据报道是伊朗对沙特阿拉伯一个空军基地进行打击造成的。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ⚡ 🇮🇱 Drone alert sirens are active in the Confrontation Line region, Northern Israel. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡ 🇮🇱 以色列北部对抗线地区无人机警报响起。@wfwitness

text: 🇺🇸 ❗️ Trump admits he has no other cards left but bombing civilian infrastructure: “The only thing left really is their water, which would be very devastating to hit.” I would hate to do it, but it’s their water, their desalination plants, and their electric generating plants. “We could have them all down. And I mean down, like you couldn’t have electricity for ten years…” You’d probably never be able to build them again. “I think we pretty much maxed out, other than those few items.“
text_zh: 🇺🇸 ❗️ 特朗普承认他除了轰炸民用基础设施外别无他法：“唯一剩下的真正是他们的水，打击它将是非常毁灭性的。” 我不想这样做，但那是他们的水，他们的海水淡化厂，以及他们的发电厂。“我们可以把它们全部摧毁。我的意思是摧毁，就像你十年都无法用电一样……” 你可能永远无法再建造它们了。“我认为除了那几项，我们基本上已经达到了极限。”
